name: firetv
title: Fire TV Control
description: Control your Fire TV — cast YouTube in SmartTube, open movies in Stremio
author: gtarraga

commands.name: cast-youtube
commands.title: Cast YouTube
commands.subtitle: Clipboard → Fire TV SmartTube
commands.description: Turn on Fire TV and play a YouTube video in SmartTube

commands.name: cast-stremio
commands.title: Cast Stremio
commands.subtitle: Clipboard → Fire TV Stremio
commands.description: Turn on Fire TV and open a movie or show in Stremio

preferences.name: haUrl
preferences.title: Home Assistant URL
preferences.description: Base URL of your Home Assistant instance

preferences.name: haToken
preferences.title: Long-Lived Access Token
preferences.description: Create one in HA → tap your name → Security → Long-lived access tokens

preferences.name: entityId
preferences.title: Fire TV Entity ID
preferences.description: The media_player entity for your Fire TV
